rationale: Courier-loop compromise is an upstream cause of systemic failure, violating Crystal Law 1 (informational > controlling) and ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION grounding principles. Delaying fixes creates irreversible constitutional breach risk.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Stale code-index (C) risks polluting all subsequent decisions, but courier-loop (A) directly threatens constitutional integrity via undetectable state divergence.
